name: Greedy Bee
short_description: Greedy Bee - The game is a mix of clicker and platformer genre, the player will have to maneuver and calculate his actions, dodge traps and get the necessary bonuses for the passage of 40+ levels.
detailed_description:
Greedy bee decided to capture all the hives in the neighborhood, but it seemed not as difficult as it turned out to be in reality. There will be various enemies and obstacles on the bee's way, because no one will give up their hives for nothing. Maneuver and calculate your actions ahead!

Greedy Bee - The game is a mix of clicker and platformer genre, the player will have to maneuver and calculate his actions, dodge traps and get the necessary bonuses for the passage of 40+ levels.

Game Features:
- Visual style
- Multiple Levels
- Complexity
